requirement.description: The BCM shall transmit the current windshield wiper speed setting on the CAN bus.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

BCM_STATUS_ID = 0x100
WIPER_BIT_START = 16
MIN_PERIODIC_FRAMES_PER_SEC = 8

@pytest.fixture(scope="session")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(
        interface=os.getenv("CAN_INTERFACE", "socketcan"),
        channel=os.getenv("CAN_CHANNEL", "can0"),
        bitrate=int(os.getenv("CAN_BITRATE", "500000"))
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def get_wiper_speed(data: bytes) -> int:
    raw = int.from_bytes(data, byteorder="little", signed=False)
    return (raw >> WIPER_BIT_START) & 0b11

def collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, duration_sec=1.0):
    msgs = []
    end_time = time.time() + duration_sec
    while time.time() < end_time:
        msg = can_bus.recv(timeout=0.05)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == BCM_STATUS_ID:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

def wait_for_wiper_value(can_bus, expected_value: int, timeout_sec=2.0):
    end_time = time.time() + timeout_sec
    while time.time() < end_time:
        msg = can_bus.recv(timeout=0.1)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == BCM_STATUS_ID:
            if get_wiper_speed(msg.data) == expected_value: return msg
    pytest.fail(f"Timeout waiting for Wiper_Speed={expected_value}")

test_cases.title: Wiper OFF Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_wip_001_off(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1)
    assert len(msgs) >= MIN_PERIODIC_FRAMES_PER_SEC
    assert all(get_wiper_speed(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Wiper LOW Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_wip_002_low(can_bus):
    wait_for_wiper_value(can_bus, 1)
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1)
    assert all(get_wiper_speed(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Wiper MEDIUM Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_wip_003_medium(can_bus):
    wait_for_wiper_value(can_bus, 2)
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1)
    assert all(get_wiper_speed(m.data) == 2 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Wiper HIGH Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_wip_004_high(can_bus):
    wait_for_wiper_value(can_bus, 3)
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1)
    assert all(get_wiper_speed(m.data) == 3 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Signal Stability Check
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Wiper set to LOW
test_cases.expected_result: All captured frames contain value 1 with no deviation
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_wip_007_stability(can_bus):
    wait_for_wiper_value(can_bus, 1)
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1.5)
    values = [get_wiper_speed(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert all(v == 1 for v in values)

test_cases.title: Negative: Invalid Value Check
Performance: Periodic Rate
test_cases.expected_result: At least 8 frames received within 1 second

test_cases.title: Robustness: Error Frame Check
test_cases.expected_result: No error frames observed for message 0x100
